problems.diagnostic: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Papa_Types::Tableau.Generic' and 'int', but must be of the same type
problems.cause: AGREE cannot compare opaque data port types with integer literals directly
problems.minimal_edit: Replace MCU1_Data_Input.data_0 through MCU1_Data_Input.data_7 with a single variable representing the data field values, since direct field access is not supported in AGREE contracts

executor_steps: Create a new constant or variable in the AGREE annex to represent the data fields
Replace all references to MCU1_Data_Input.data_0 through MCU1_Data_Input.data_7 with the new variable
Ensure the new variable is declared with a compatible type that can be compared with MCU1_Send_Output.channels
